phases.description: Implement from LowerPlane: Public pricing ladder like WitnessBC toolkits → install tiers
Implement from Delve: Fast install motion — always verify independent auditor (lesson from 2026 controversy)
Implement from Sprinto: Policy pack → control checklist → export bundle
Implement from Scrut Automation: Shadow-mode parallel install narrative for Witness AI Flow
Implement from Comp AI: ≤30-day install promise on Witness AI Flow SOW
Implement from Oneleet: Proof call + deposit SOW before signature
Implement from Secureframe: Export bundle buyer can hand to auditor
Implement from Vanta: Control → linked proof artifact (pattern only)
Implement from Drata: Live control status page pattern
Implement from Gumloop: App policies + guardrails UI on agent dispatch
Implement from Stack AI: SOC2/HIPAA lane packaging for Witness AI Ops retainer
Implement from Relevance AI: Packaged agent install SKUs like Witness AI Flow
Implement from Lakera Guard: Policy at dispatch allow/block log
Implement from Holistic AI: Risk score on each agent action for ops retainer
Implement from Arthur AI: Drift/quality alerts on Witness AI Ops
Implement from Monitaur: Model/agent inventory for policy packs
Implement from Lasso Security: Shadow AI discovery in policy starter kits
Implement from Dust.tt: Packaged team templates for first install
Implement from Voiceflow: Conversation run history on agent loops
Implement from Maven AGI: Escalation + action log per ticket pattern

stack_surfaces.onboard: Founding cohort shadow parallel install SOW
stack_surfaces.integrate: Policy packs mapped to agent receipt gates
stack_surfaces.scope_note: AI policy + first agentic install — site independence law

tiers.description: Critical — smallest shippable slice with receipt
High — next sprint parity with competitor
Low — research, defer note, or compare-only
